must_not_assert: A0 launched its downloaded file or the host was compromised; no child process or execution of C:\Users\Administrator\Default_File_Path.ps1 is present in A0's scoped process/file lifecycle

the_trap: A hidden-window PowerShell download cradle (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadFile is a real staging indicator, but no execution of the file written by this process is present in its scoped process/file lifecycle; do not over-claim a confirmed compromise.
rationale: A0 runs powershell -WindowStyle hidden to DownloadFile a remote file to C:\Users\Administrator\Default_File_Path.ps1, whose creation is recorded in EV-003. No child process or execution of that path is present in A0's scoped lifecycle. A later raw event that invokes a same-named script belongs to a different ProcessGuid, parent, and output path and is therefore a separate variant. The A0 outcome remains unconfirmed: suspicious, not confirmed.
